fields.default: Field(0.0, description='Information completeness score (0-1)', ge=0.0, le=1.0)

fields.name: responses
fields.default: Field(..., description='Map of field_name to user response')

fields.name: route_name
fields.default: Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=100, description='Unique route name')

fields.name: sub_intent
fields.default: Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=100, description='Specific intent type')

fields.name: enabled
fields.default: Field(None, description='Enable or disable the route')

fields.name: content
fields.default: Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=10000, description='User input text to classify')

fields.name: source
fields.default: Field(default='user', description='Source of the input (user, servicenow, prometheus, etc.)')

fields.name: include_risk_assessment
fields.default: Field(default=True, description='Whether to include risk assessment in response')

fields.name: content
fields.default: Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=10000, description='Test input text')

fields.name: is_complete
fields.default: Field(..., description='Whether all required information is present')

fields.name: missing_fields
fields.default: Field(default_factory=list, description='List of missing required fields')

fields.name: optional_missing
fields.default: Field(default_factory=list, description='List of missing optional fields')

fields.name: suggestions
fields.default: Field(default_factory=list, description='Suggestions for gathering missing information')

fields.name: routing_layer
fields.default: Field(..., description='Layer that made the decision (pattern/semantic/llm)')

fields.name: rule_id
fields.default: Field(default=None, description='Rule ID if pattern matched')

fields.name: patrol_id
fields.default: Field(None, description='指定巡檢 ID，為空則執行所有檢查')

fields.name: check_types
fields.default: Field(None, description='指定檢查類型列表', example=['service_health', 'api_response'])

fields.name: strategy
fields.default: Field(default='hybrid', description='Decomposition strategy: hierarchical, sequential, parallel, hybrid')

fields.name: decision_type
fields.default: Field(default='routing', description='Decision type: routing, resource, error_handling, priority, escalation, optimization')

fields.name: max_round_count
fields.default: Field(default=20, ge=1, le=100, description='最大輪數')

fields.name: max_stall_count
fields.default: Field(default=3, ge=1, le=10, description='最大停滯次數')

fields.name: decision
fields.default: Field(..., description='Decision: approve, revise, reject, continue, replan, guidance')

fields.name: mode
fields.default: Field(default='simple', description='規劃模式: simple, decomposed, decision_driven, adaptive, full')

fields.name: decomposition_strategy
fields.default: Field(default=None, description='分解策略: sequential, hierarchical, parallel, hybrid')

fields.name: max_retries
fields.default: Field(default=3, ge=1, le=10, description='最大重試次數')

fields.name: session_id
fields.default: Field(None, description='會話 ID，不提供則自動生成')

fields.name: max_turns
fields.default: Field(default=100, ge=1, le=1000, description='最大輪次')

fields.name: max_history_length
fields.default: Field(default=50, ge=10, le=500, description='最大歷史長度')

fields.name: session_timeout_seconds
fields.default: Field(default=3600, ge=60, description='會話超時時間')

fields.name: storage_type
fields.default: Field(default='memory', description='存儲類型: memory, redis, postgres, file')

fields.name: strict
fields.default: Field(True, description='是否嚴格模式 (缺少變量時拋出錯誤)')

fields.name: id
fields.default: Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=100, description='模板 ID')

fields.name: name
fields.default: Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=200, description='模板名稱')

fields.name: count
fields.default: Field(..., description='每個分類的模板數量')

fields.name: max_hypotheses
fields.default: Field(5, ge=1, le=10, description='Max hypotheses to generate')

fields.name: event_id
fields.default: Field(..., description='Event ID to find similar patterns for')

fields.name: min_similarity
fields.default: Field(0.5, ge=0.0, le=1.0, description='Minimum similarity score')

fields.name: max_results
fields.default: Field(10, ge=1, le=50, description='Maximum results to return')

fields.name: user_id
fields.default: Field(..., description='User ID for the sandbox')

fields.name: timeout_seconds
fields.default: Field(default=300, ge=1, le=3600, description='Timeout in seconds')

fields.name: max_memory_mb
fields.default: Field(default=512, ge=64, le=4096, description='Max memory in MB')

fields.default: Field(..., description='Message type: EXECUTE, ENV_CHECK, FS_CHECK, NET_CHECK')

fields.name: content
fields.default: Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=100000, description='訊息內容')

fields.default: Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=100000, description='訊息內容')

fields.name: attachment_ids

fields.default: Field(..., description='Session ID for SSE subscription')

fields.default: Field(..., description='SSE endpoint for real-time updates')

fields.default: Field(None, ge=0, le=10, description='最大重試次數')

fields.default: Field(..., description='Target version to rollback to')

fields.default: Field(..., description='Whether the action is approved')

fields.default: Field(default_factory=list, description='Conditions attached to the approval')
